summary: Music workspace polish, AirPlay routing, and sidebar UX improvements.

changed: Music Now Playing shows live progress; search results play through in order from the row you pick
AirPlay button in Now Playing routes catalog playback and Music.app speakers or HomePods
Music workspace stays open while audio is playing; incoming mail shows a modal when you are on Music
Sidebar Music row shows a Playing badge; Notes counts align with other workspace badges
Sidebar rows use a pointer cursor and no longer beep when re-clicking Music
